title: From 64 to 100 Projects: Indian Railways Doubles Down With Rs 1.53 Lakh Crore Investment
description: Indian Railways has sanctioned 100 projects worth ₹1.53 lakh crore in FY 2025‑26 under the PM Gati Shakti plan, covering 6,000 km of new lines, doubling, and multitracking to boost connectivity, freight corridors, and passenger safety.
